title: craftable-dyed-shulkers
description: A Datapack which adds the option to directly craft colored shulkers
body:
**Craftable Colored Shulkers Datapack**

The *Craftable Colored Shulkers* datapack allows you to craft Shulker Boxes in any color right from the start! Skip the dyeing step by crafting Shulker Boxes directly in your chosen color using this datapack. Perfect for organizing storage with color-coded Shulker Boxes from the moment you craft them.

### Features:
- **Direct Colored Shulker Crafting**: Craft Shulker Boxes in all 16 colors directly, no need to dye them afterward.
- **Simple and Efficient**: Streamlines inventory organization by letting you create color-coded Shulker Boxes on the crafting table.
